evals.prompt: Design the notification preferences panel. Users toggle per-channel (email/push/SMS) per notification category. SecurityAlert must keep at least one channel.
evals.expected_output: UI spec with component hierarchy, all states, responsive behavior, a11y specs
expectations: All toggle states: on, off, disabled, focus

evals.prompt: Design an order history list with status badges (Draft, Confirmed, Shipped, Cancelled). Include empty, loading, and error states.
evals.expected_output: UI spec with all list states, status badges using text+color (not color alone), responsive layout
expectations: Status badges use text + color (not color alone — accessibility)
Responsive: cards on mobile, table on desktop
